_doc: Single reference catalog of every cell/row/column reference used by the opr-mis extraction pipeline. Regenerated 2026-07-06 from the extractor sources listed in each entry. Sections keyed by plant. Conventions: A1 refs are 1-based Excel addresses; 'rc' pairs are 0-based [row, col]; 'row_hints' are fallback rows used only when label scanning fails; runtime overrides live in backend/excel_cells_config.json (sections bsl_dpr, isp_morning, bsp_ppc_mis, dsp_pdf) and are editable without code changes.

BSP.config_override: backend/excel_cells_config.json section 'bsp_ppc_mis' (cells_rc) — takes precedence over hardcoded defaults
BSP.workbook: BSP PPC MIS daily/month-end report (.xls or .xlsx), e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/BSPMIS30052026.xls
BSP.month_detection: cell N1 (row 0, col 13, 0-based) — Excel date serial

BSP.source_code: backend/excel_extractors/excel_extractor_bsp.py (PARAM_MAP_3PAGE) — duplicated in excel_extractor_bsp_techno.py (PARAM_MAP); row map also in backend/techno_project/bsp_techno_map.json
BSP.workbook: BSP 3-page Tech .xlsx, e.g. Report_format/Monthly/BSP/3 page Tech for COMay'26.xlsx
BSP.sheet: Sheet1 (or S2 in PPC MIS workbook)
BSP.month_detection: A3 = month name; row-4 headers APR..MAR in cols D(4)..O(15)
BSP.addressing: fixed 1-based row + month-dependent data column (D-O); cumulative column detected by row-4 header in {ACTUAL,CUM,...}, fallback P(16)

extra_rows_in_map_json_only._note: present in bsp_techno_map.json but not in PARAM_MAP (used by JSON-map pipeline)

computed: Sinter %/Pellet % in Burden (techno_calc_utils.calculate_burden_percentages, from consumed quantities)

BSP.source_code: backend/excel_extractors/excel_extractor_bsp.py (PARAM_MAP_OISCO) — duplicated in excel_extractor_bsp_oisco.py (PARAM_MAP); row map also in backend/techno_project/bsp_oisco_map.json
BSP.workbook: OISCO_<Mon>'YY.xlsx (R3C3 title contains TECHNO ECONOMIC PARAMETERS)
BSP.month_detection: title cell C3 (regex _MMM'YY); data column found by matching month abbr in header row 6; CUM column scanned in row 6 (fallback data_col+1)
BSP.addressing: fixed 1-based row + month-dependent data column; label col C(3), unit col D(4)

BSP.workbook: BSP Special Steel report .xlsx (sheet CORP, R3C1='BHILAI STEEL PLANT')
BSP.addressing: dynamic row scan from row 6; fixed columns

columns.A(1): Product group label (SEMIS / WIRE RODS / MERCHANT PRODUCTS / BRM PRODUCT / RAILS / PLATES; TOTAL* = subtotal)

BSP.stop_condition: row where col A contains 'TOTAL SPECIAL STEEL' (included as grand total)

BSP.notes: values already in '000T (no divide); Oven Pushing and COB rows kept as-is

BSP.addressing: fully dynamic — header row located by furnace names BF-4/BF-6/BF-7/BF-8; parameter rows matched by fuzzy label against PARAM_UNITS

ISP.workbook: ISP Morning Report .xlsx, e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/MORNING REPORT.xlsx
ISP.month_detection: K5 (datetime or DD.MM.YYYY string); K5 = 1st of month AFTER report period
ISP.target_table: production_table (plant ISP); raw Tonnes /1000 except no_convert items

ISP.workbook: ISP Final Monthly Report .xlsx (also part of Summarized Monthly workbook, e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/REP010626.xlsx)
ISP Summarized Monthly Report .xlsx (sheets B-FCE, SINTER, SMS, WRM, BM, USM, COKE OVENS, Maj Techno Summ, Maj Production Summ)
ISP.column_detection: ACT column found by scanning header row for "Mon'YY" with 'ACT' in sub-header row below/right (_find_act_col). Header/subheader rows: B-FCE=4/5, all others=3/4. Cumulative col = ACT col + offset per month: Apr=0 May-Aug=2 Sep=4 Oct/Nov=2 Dec=4 Jan/Feb=2 Mar=6

label_scanned_rows._note: row found by scanning col B for label; fallback row in parens

fixed_rows.Blows per Day: R10 total heats / R2 calendar days

ISP.notes: values already in '000T; Oven Pushing/COB rows as-is

RSP.workbook: RSP Final Monthly Report .xlsx, e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/RSP31052026.xlsx
RSP.row_resolution: label scan (alias exact -> prefix) with row hint fallback
RSP.target_table: production_table (plant RSP); /1000 except NO_CONVERT {Oven Pushing, COB#6, COB#1-5}

RSP.row_resolution: label scan with row hint fallback; SMS block params located by offset from O2 anchor rows ('Oxygen Consmn LD' for SMS-1, 'Oxygen Cons BOF II' for SMS-2): -3=Avg heat wt, -1=lining life, 0=O2, +3=Converter Yield, +4=Caster Yield
RSP.notes: Avg Blows per day workbook value is total blows/month -> divided by days in month (YTD by FY days)

RSP.workbook: same Final Monthly workbook or standalone 'technopara *.xlsx' (e.g. h:/opr-mis/technopara APRIL-2026.xlsx)
RSP.row_resolution: shop anchor row scan then param alias scan within section range; row hints as fallback

RSP.workbook: RSP Daily Morning Report .xlsx (sheet name starts 'RSP Morning Report Data for-'), e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/mcr1_31052026.xls
RSP Special Steel .xlsx — single sheet, R1C1 starts 'Special Steel'
RSP.addressing: dynamic row scan from row 6; fixed columns
RSP.stop_condition: label starts GRAND TOTAL / Total Saleable / % Special

BSL.month_detection: O1 (Excel datetime or DD.MM.YYYY); mismatch with selector raises error
BSL.target_table: production_table (plant BSL); raw Tonnes /1000 except no_convert

opening_stock_cells._note: sheet 'Delhi Report'; col M = closing stock of report month = opening of next month; /1000

BSL.source_code: backend/excel_extractors/excel_extractor_bsl.py (_TECHNO_PARAM_MAP); consumed by techno_project/bsl_technopara_extractor.py (key remapping only, no extra cells)
BSL.workbook: TECHNO <MON><YYYY>.XLS/.XLSX (month from Sheet1 header rows 1-5 or filename)
BSL.addressing: fixed sheet + 1-based row; month col = F(6), cumulative = G(7) (mon_col+1) unless noted

fax_gm_oprn_sheet.column_layout: rows 12-32: mon=G(7) cum=I(9); rows 48-93: mon=H(8) cum=J(10); per-furnace table rows 37-42 uses adjacent col pairs per param

BSL.workbook: BSL BF Performance & Analysis Report PDF (e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/BSL/BlastFurnace (N).pdf); month from 'For DD/MM/YYYY' header
BSL.addressing: pipe-delimited text tables; furnace rows BF-1/2/3/4/5 + Shop; 'UNDER CAPITAL REPAIR' rows skipped

BSL.workbook: BSL Corporate Office Special Steel .xlsx (Sheet1, R1C1 contains SPECIAL STEEL)
BSL.addressing: dynamic row scan from row 7; fixed columns

columns.A(1): product group (HR COIL/HR PLATE/HR SHEET/CR COIL//SLAB; GRND/TOT stops scan)
columns.D(4): Actual Up To Last Month (stored cply_actual, display only)

BSL.addressing: months in ROWS, items in COLUMNS (transposed vs other plants)

DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.workbook: DSP MCR-I 'mcr1_*.xls' — tab-separated TEXT file despite .xls extension, e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/mcr1_31052026.xls
DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.addressing: 1-based row + 0-based col; col D(3)=Actual To Date, col E(4)=Monthly Rate; column_shift param (-1 for Sep'25 layout) shifts both

rows._note: col E (Monthly Rate) unless stated; trailing spaces in 'Bloom Caster ' / 'Blooms for Sale ' are intentional (match DB)
rows.Round Production: 23 (col D — col E blank for M/c-4)

DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.config_override: backend/excel_cells_config.json section 'dsp_pdf' (item_map, saleable_map) — currently empty, defaults used
DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.workbook: DSP OMI monthly PDF (e.g. h:/opr-mis/OMI Mar26.pdf); report month from first-page text 'Month YYYY'
DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.addressing: fully label-based: pages located by heading scan (_SECTION_HEADINGS), rows matched by keyword regex, month column matched against header months

section_headings.sms2: STEEL MELTING SHOP + BOF SHOP CONTD

production_item_map._note: (label keyword -> production_table item); divide=/1000 except Oven Pushing
production_item_map.saleable: finished/semis/total: Finished Steel / Saleable Semis / Saleable Steel

MAJOR page: gross energy consumption -> Specific Energy Consumption
loss at skip -> Coke Screen Loss
Wheel/Axle page: finished wheel / yield over good bloom

DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.workbook: DSP Flash PDF (e.g. Report_format/flash-may26.pdf), page 1 single table; detected by 'In-process Stock' + 'Sal.Steel Stock' text
DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.addressing: table col indices: items col[7]; In-process col[9]; Sal.Steel col[12]; Total col[13]

values.BLOOM/BILLETS INPROCESS: sum of In-process column values in the 'CC Billet' row block

DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.workbook: ASP Daily Performance Summary (asp.xlsx/.xls), e.g. Report_format/MONTHEND/asp.xlsx

cells.Total Crude Steel: row with 'CRUDE STEEL'/'CRUDE' in col A -> col F
cells.Ingot Steel: row with 'INGOT PRODUCTION' in col A -> col F
cells.Total Caster: computed: Total Crude Steel - Ingot Steel
cells.Saleable Steel: row with 'SALEABLE STEEL' in col A -> col F
cells.Closing Stock: row with 'TOTAL PLANT ST.' (any col) -> col L

items.Crude Steel: 'SMS (SLAB)' row -> 1st number (Cum Actual; On Date col blank)
items.Saleable Steel / Finished Steel: SALEABLE PRODUCTION section 'TOTAL' row -> 2nd number (Cum Actual)

formats.A month-end (On Date|To Date|APP|%): target = 2nd number on item line (To Date cumulative)
formats.B daily production (Day-APP|Day-ACT|Mont: target = 4th number (Month ACT); detected by 'daily production' text

DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.workbook: Report_format/ABP/ASPSSPVISL.xlsx (sheet containing 'APP' or 'PLAN', fallback first sheet)
DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.addressing: row 1 from col C = datetime month headers (Apr-Mar, stops at non-datetime annual col); col A = plant name (carried forward); col B = item name; values already '000T
DSP_ASP_SSP_VISL.derived: SSP/VISL: Finished Steel mirrored from Saleable Steel
